title: Renewable Diesel Quarterly Trend Sheet - Q4 2025
content:
Global Renewable Diesel Production Gains Momentum in 2025Q3

Global renewable diesel production is expected to rise in 2025 Q3, supported by recovering margins and policy-driven demand, following earlier dips in North America and Europe. U.S. imports are expected to remain at historic lows as the 45Z Clean Fuel Production Credit incentivizes domestic production over foreign supply. In Europe, trade dynamics continue to favor domestic Renewable Diesel, reinforced by anti-dumping actions and higher mandates, while Canadaâ€™s proposed CFR amendments signal greater policy stability by maintaining the regulations' primary focus without further delays.
author: Mohammed Saaim Akram
